## Idea

Clear summary of the improvement, and what problem it addresses.

## Why now

Why this idea should be considered now versus later.

## Success signal

What would make this idea feel done?

## Scope

- [ ] Research / design only
- [ ] Small prototype
- [ ] Full implementation candidate

## Public and backlog anchors

- Design packet needed? (Yes/No):
- Suggested backlog path: `docs/method/backlog/cool-ideas/...`
